DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC. 'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION, TO BE NOTICED BY PLAINTIFFF, AND TO COMPLETE THAT DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN MARCH 26, 2010. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $741, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
